item.title: Contact
item.description:
Contact

I’m open to opportunities, collaborations, and conversations in data science, data engineering, supply chain analytics, and operational excellence.

  • Email: Trebligism@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gilbert-onyenwezi-71853531/
  • GitHub: https://github.com/yourusername
